2325810.name: Paddle Flap Demo
2325810.description:
Welcome to Paddle Flap, a minimalist casual arcade game where you control a paddle at the bottom of the screen and flap it left or right to bounce falling balls. Use precise timing to control the direction of the balls and hit red targets with red balls and blue targets with blue balls.

Along the way, collect power-ups and earn achievements as you unlock new ball and paddle graphics. Can you master the art of Paddle Flap and become a top scorer? Play now and find out!

Features:

  • High speed ball action
  • Simple but engaging gameplay
  • Satisfying paddle interaction
  • Power-ups
  • High Score
  • Achievements
  • Unlockable balls and paddles
  • Original soundtrack

Paddle Flap is currently in development for mobile app stores, with a desktop version to follow. The Steam version will be optimized for the platform and deliver an immersive gameplay experience.
